summary: 0.6.57 keeps non-trigger movie joystick inside the original scrub-session choreography while moving its target by one discrete 15-second step per stick excursion, so the operator gets larger video joystick movement without the repeated live skip seeks that disrupted sync in 0.6.56.
operatorSignals: 0.6.56 made movie joystick distance feel right but audio sync drifted again.
The lane wants the larger transport distance without changing the sync-preserving seek choreography recovered from the imagepanel investigation.
actionsTaken: Removed repeated live skip seeks from the non-trigger movie joystick branch.
Restored the original paused scrub-session control flow for non-trigger movie joystick input.
Changed the scrub-session target movement to one 15-second step per stick excursion.
nonGoals: No slideshow work in this slice.
No right-stick volume, gaze, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
No change to image stepping behavior in this slice.
